A Few Words About Us
Kiosco Marietta Square
Kiosco Marietta Square is now open with a passion for hospitality and great Mediterranean food. Our menu tells the story of the dishes we know and love from our childhoods raised with Mediterranean Cuisine.
Kiosco Marietta Square defines the quintessential Mediterranean Europe restaurant where people gather to eat with family, friends, and strangers alike.
You can find us open all day, seven days a week. We can’t wait to see you soon.
Reviews
Start stop reviews carousel
Review by - Google
five star review by
Wes P:
I stopped in with my family while at the weekend market today. This place is awesome. I highly recommend it. The food is amazing, the service was awesome and the owner is the nicest guy and really cares about providing a great experience. Give it try, you won't be disappointed.
Review by - Google
five star review by
Senerica T:
Did a little shopping around the square yesterday and found this little hidden gem and i must say this place is most definitely a 10/10. The food was amazing and the atmosphere compliments everything so well. Will definitely be back, was an amazing experience.
Review by - Google
five star review by
Simone A:
Exactly one year after trying Kiosco, we stopped by for a Turkish coffee and some delicious Baklava. We can't believe we waited a year. A hidden gem in Marietta. Great service and delicious food. We definitely won't let another year go by.

Kiosco Marietta Square - Food Menu
Our Menu
All Day Menu
These items are cooked to order | Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase your risk of foodborne illness, especially if you have certain medical conditions.
Breakfast
Served from Monday to Friday till 2:00 pm, and from Saturday to Sunday till 3:00 pm
Omelette

$18.00

Turkish Breakfast - For Two / Weekend only
$45.00

Beetroot hummus, roasted red pepper feta dip, and tzatziki dip with homemade pita.
Spanakopita

Lunch + Dinner
